data.body:
[Special Live Broadcast, Go! Go! Kivotos! Preview]

Did you know there will be a special Live Broadcast on Blue Archive’s official YouTube channel?
Don’t miss out on the quiz and events you can participate in during the live show!

➡️Details: https://m.nexon.com/forum/thread/103712
